professional_summaries_by_title.title: PhD Researcher in Quantum Computing
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: Researcher focused on quantum-safe blockchain and distributed ledger technologies, with interests spanning quantum algorithms, quantum optimization, quantum error correction, fault-tolerant quantum computing, post-quantum cryptography, blockchain security, quantum networking, and secure distributed infrastructures.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: Computer Systems Engineer
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: Engineer trained in computer systems engineering with foundations in networking, cybersecurity, distributed systems, software architecture, infrastructure, operating systems, databases, cloud concepts, and system design.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: Software Engineer
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: Full-stack software engineer experienced in production-grade SaaS platforms, enterprise systems, APIs, CI/CD, Dockerized deployments, frontend performance, backend architecture, database design, and maintainable software delivery.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: AI Engineer
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: AI engineer experienced in deep learning, computer vision, RAG systems, medical AI platforms, AI agents, workflow automation, model integration, and production AI infrastructure.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: Backend Engineer
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: Backend engineer experienced with REST APIs, Laravel, NestJS, FastAPI, microservices, event-driven workflows, database management, cloud integrations, and containerized production deployments.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: Frontend Engineer
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: Frontend engineer experienced with React, Next.js, Vue.js, responsive interfaces, dynamic UI systems, marketplace UX, frontend optimization, and user-centered product implementation.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: Database Administration / Data Engineering
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: Practitioner with experience designing and maintaining MySQL, PostgreSQL, and MongoDB-backed systems, supporting SaaS platforms, marketplaces, medical applications, automation systems, and scraped analytics pipelines.

professional_summaries_by_title.title: System Design / DevOps
professional_summaries_by_title.summary: System designer with hands-on experience in Docker, Docker Compose, cloud deployment, multi-service architectures, network topology design, Cisco configuration, CI/CD, and production operations.

education.degree_or_program: Computer Systems Engineering degree and Master's-level research track
education.institution: Higher School of Computer Science 08 May 1945, Sidi Bel Abbès (ESI-SBA)

theses.title: Development of an AI-Powered Platform for Solving Automotive Problems in Algeria Through Innovative Services
theses.summary: Designed and implemented AutoHub, a platform integrating AI-powered automotive spare-part visual search, marketplace services, TowLink towing services, and mechanic-client communication and management tools.

theses.title: Real-Time Detection and Identification of Spare Parts Using Deep Learning
theses.summary: Researched and evaluated deep learning and computer vision methods for recognizing automotive spare parts from images.

academic_milestones: Achieved perfect marks in both first-year Computer Architecture examinations, according to provided source text.
Ranked among the Top 10 nationally in the preparatory-cycle national engineering entrance examination, according to provided source text.
Chose Computer Systems Engineering because it aligned with systems, networking, cybersecurity, software architecture, and distributed computing interests.

verified_items: ESI-SBA is presented by its official domain as the Higher School of Computer Science 08 May 1945, Sidi Bel Abbès.

LabRI-SBA is described in provided official-site excerpt as the Computer Science Research Laboratory of Sidi Bel-Abbès, created by ministerial decree no. 1218 of 02 December 2015 and structured into four teams: ISEWED, SOC, DASE, and CISCO.
The ESI-SBA official site lists the engineering formation path: preparatory class, second-cycle common core, and specialties including ISI, SIW, IASD, and CyS.

The official ISI page states that the specialty covers computer systems applications including computer networks, real-time systems, embedded systems, infrastructure design, development, and operation.

The official ISI page lists targeted competencies in network architecture, infrastructure modeling, network administration, hardware/software system design, embedded systems, system security, operating systems, and virtualization.
The official ESI-SBA site lists LabRI-SBA as a research laboratory created by ministerial decree no. 1218 of 02 December 2015, with ISEWED, SOC, DASE, and CISCO teams.
official_verification.verification_note: The official LabRI details are based on the user-provided official website excerpt; full page retrieval was not available in the local extraction pass. Dates, ranking, grades, and thesis details are taken from provided PDF/text.

official_program_details.official_objective_summary_en: The ISI specialty provides future engineers with fundamental knowledge of computer systems and their applications in computer networks, real-time systems, embedded systems, and related domains. It trains engineering managers capable of leading projects covering the design, development, and operation of IT infrastructures, with technological mastery and awareness of economic, social, and human contexts.
official_targeted_competencies_en: Define organizational telecommunications network needs and architecture.
Design, analyze, and configure computer network architectures.
Design and model technical infrastructure such as servers and networks.
Install and configure network equipment such as switches and routers, and network/telecom administration software.
Handle network administration tasks, including user access rights, user training, and security awareness.
Design systems across hardware and software layers and understand their mutual interactions and application dependencies.
Develop advanced digital systems for hardware/software design of embedded systems.
Design, analyze, and program systems interfacing computing with electronics, electrotechnics, mechanics, robotics, and related areas.
Design embedded software and architecture from client requirements.
Secure systems by identifying and correcting vulnerabilities at operating system, network, and software-construction levels.
Master security standards, procedures, and related tools/technologies such as firewalls, antivirus, cryptography, authentication servers, penetration testing, PKI, and URL filtering.
Master major operating systems and virtualization environments including Linux, Windows, VMware ESXi, XEN, and RHEV.
official_target_roles_en: Director of infrastructure and IT production

research_and_publications.title: Quantum-Safe Blockchain and Distributed Ledger Technologies
research_and_publications.apa_citation: Souala, E. (in preparation). Quantum-safe blockchain and distributed ledger technologies [Survey paper].
research_and_publications.description: Comprehensive review of quantum-safe blockchain technologies, post-quantum cryptography, distributed ledger architectures, quantum threats, migration strategies, and future research challenges.

research_and_publications.title: A Hybrid Quantum-Classical State-Space Framework for Cyber-Defense Optimization: LQR-to-QUBO Formulation and IBM Quantum Validation
research_and_publications.apa_citation: Souala, E. (submitted). A hybrid quantum-classical state-space framework for cyber-defense optimization: LQR-to-QUBO formulation and IBM Quantum validation [Conference paper].
research_and_publications.description: Hybrid quantum-classical optimization framework reformulating Linear Quadratic Regulator cyber-defense problems into QUBO models executable on IBM Quantum hardware.

research_and_publications.title: Real-Time Detection and Identification of Spare Parts Using Deep Learning
research_and_publications.institution: Higher School of Computer Science 08 May 1945, Sidi Bel Abbès (ESI-SBA)
research_and_publications.apa_citation: Souala, E. (2024). Real-time detection and identification of spare parts using deep learning [Master's thesis, Higher School of Computer Science 08 May 1945, Sidi Bel Abbès].
research_and_publications.description: Designed and evaluated deep learning models for automatic recognition of automotive spare parts from images, including computer vision techniques, CNNs, dataset construction, and AI-assisted product identification.

research_and_publications.title: Development of an AI-Powered Platform for Solving Automotive Problems in Algeria Through Innovative Services
research_and_publications.institution: Higher School of Computer Science 08 May 1945, Sidi Bel Abbès (ESI-SBA)

projects.title: ESI Examination Planning & Faculty Coordination System
projects.description: Centralized examination planning platform for organizing examination schedules, coordinating teacher supervision assignments, allocating classrooms, and managing examination sessions through a unified web interface.
projects.system_architecture: Monolithic web application with MySQL persistence, administrative scheduling interfaces, classroom and teacher assignment modules, and conflict-reduction workflows.

projects.title: ESI Project Management & Supervisor Coordination Platform
projects.description: Platform for managing academic project lifecycles at ESI-SBA, including team formation, project theme selection, fairness in allocation, supervisor coordination, progress tracking, document submission, and communication.
projects.system_architecture: React frontend connected to Laravel backend and MySQL database, with role-based workflows for students, supervisors, and administration.

projects.title: CIB - Intelligent Clinical Information System
projects.description: Complete information system for a real clinic under construction, covering network topology, Cisco configuration, IP addressing, security planning, staff administration, patient and doctor management, appointments, medical records, healthcare service coordination, and AI-ready services.
projects.system_architecture: Multi-layer healthcare ecosystem combining Cisco-modeled network infrastructure, secure backend services, React frontend modules, relational databases, and FastAPI-based AI service integration.

projects.title: AutoHub - AI-Powered Automotive Ecosystem
projects.description: Unified automotive platform with three main features: AutoSpares marketplace with AI-powered image search trained on scraped public labeled spare-part datasets; TowLink Uber-like towing service; and mechanic-client management, communication, scheduling, and service tracking.
projects.system_architecture: React frontend, Laravel backend with real-time communication through Reverb, FastAPI AI service for computer vision inference, CNN/TensorFlow model pipeline, marketplace modules, towing dispatch modules, mechanic-client CRM modules, and relational databases.

projects.title: AquaTracker - Smart Maritime Monitoring Platform
projects.description: Marine and fishermen support platform using LoRaWAN and IoT for long-range vessel tracking, maritime communication, GPS monitoring, and sensor data collection in isolated marine areas.
projects.system_architecture: Distributed embedded nodes using ESP32/Arduino and LoRaWAN radio communication, centralized Laravel backend, React dashboard, and MySQL data storage for monitoring and coordination.

projects.title: KAGEN - Intelligent Wildfire Detection & Environmental Monitoring System
projects.description: Remote wildfire detection and weather monitoring platform for isolated locations, collecting humidity, temperature, environmental conditions, and fire indicators through distributed IoT devices.
projects.system_architecture: Low-power sensor nodes using Arduino/ESP32 and LoRaWAN, backend data ingestion, MySQL storage, and React/Laravel monitoring dashboard.

projects.title: Jahir - Enterprise Influencer Marketing Ecosystem
projects.category: Professional project at Apollo Digital Solutions
projects.description: SaaS ecosystem with admin platform for conflict management, influencers, companies, plans and subscriptions; influencer platform for service sharing, company discovery, and stats comparison; company platform for job posting, influencer hiring, collaboration, and analytics; scraper platform for collecting and storing influencer social media statistics over time.
projects.system_architecture: Multi-portal SaaS architecture using Vue.js frontends, Laravel backend, Laravel Reverb real-time features, FilamentPHP admin modules, MySQL database, Apify scraping integrations, and automated analytics pipelines.

projects.title: CashMétaux - Waste Management & Logistics Platform
projects.category: Professional project at Apollo Digital Solutions
projects.description: French waste management platform for managing waste locations, companies, dumpster renting, waste buying/selling, delivery, routing, and operational coordination.
projects.system_architecture: Laravel API backend with FilamentPHP administrative interfaces and MySQL storage for logistics, rental, commercial, and route-management workflows.

projects.title: Tech360 - Technology Marketplace
projects.category: Professional project at Apollo Digital Solutions
projects.description: Technology marketplace for shops and clients with reels-style ads, WooCommerce API integrations, scraped product data, automated synchronization pipelines, optimized frontend UX, and dynamic UI.
projects.system_architecture: Next.js 16 frontend integrated with WooCommerce APIs and automated scraping/synchronization pipelines, optimized for responsive UX and continuously updated marketplace content.

projects.title: AI Agents & Intelligent Business Automation Platform
projects.description: AI agent and automation platform for French real estate agencies, covering coaching sessions, AI calls, automated workflows, CRM/calendar coordination, and cloud-service integrations.
projects.system_architecture: NestJS microservices backend, React 19/Next.js frontend, MongoDB persistence, n8n workflow orchestration, Azure and Google Cloud integrations, and Docker/Docker Compose containerized deployment.

projects.title: Medical AI Learning Platform & Annotation System
projects.description: RAG AI system for medical students and annotation application for MRI and X-ray scans, built in collaboration with radiologists for learning and dataset preparation workflows.
projects.system_architecture: FastAPI AI/RAG services, Laravel backend modules, React 19 frontend, MySQL database, REST APIs, and annotation workflows for medical imaging.

projects.title: Smart Study Platform
projects.description: Study application for managing PDFs, notes, time tracking, smart study plans, configurable Pomodoro-style sessions including 30-minute work and 5-minute break cycles, and progress analytics.
projects.system_architecture: Web platform centered on document management, planning logic, time-tracking modules, and personalized scheduling workflows.

projects.title: OpenDesk - Business Scheduling Platform
projects.description: Client service and scheduling management system for service providers, including customer management, appointments, calendar workflows, communication, and real-time updates.
projects.system_architecture: Laravel backend, React frontend, MySQL persistence, and Laravel Reverb for real-time scheduling and service-management updates.

projects.title: E-Learning Platform
projects.description: Subscription-based learning platform for publishing educational content, managing student enrollments, controlling subscription plans, organizing digital courses, and delivering learning materials.
projects.system_architecture: Subscription-oriented web platform with content management, enrollment management, payment/subscription workflows, and scalable course delivery modules.

projects.title: Kodotiq
projects.description: IT consulting company designed and developed by Souala Elhoussine, providing software engineering, AI development, cloud solutions, automation services, and digital transformation solutions for startups and businesses.
projects.system_architecture: Consulting and service-delivery business platform supporting custom enterprise software, AI solutions, cloud deployments, and automation projects.

projects.title: Twreed - Manufacturing & Service Marketplace
projects.description: Marketplace connecting clients looking for products and services with small factories, agencies, workshops, woodworking providers, sewing/tailoring providers, and other local service/product providers, including delivery management.
projects.system_architecture: Marketplace platform with client-provider coordination, quotation/order workflows, production tracking, communication, and delivery logistics management.

projects.title: CargoLoop - Collaborative Logistics Platform
projects.description: Logistics platform solving empty return trips by connecting people with packages to trucks or large vehicles already returning empty after deliveries along compatible routes.
projects.system_architecture: Route-matching platform for available cargo capacity, package requests, vehicle route matching, logistics coordination, and fleet-utilization optimization.

projects.title: Niro - Private School Management SaaS
projects.description: SaaS platform for private school management, designed to centralize administrative operations while integrating smart e-learning features for digital education workflows.
projects.system_architecture: Multi-tenant school management SaaS with modules for administration, users, academic operations, and integrated smart e-learning features supporting online learning and school coordination.

deployment_and_devops_profile.summary: Most academic, professional, freelance, and independent projects were designed for production deployment using Docker, Docker Compose, containerization, cloud deployment, multi-service architecture, and scalable backend service practices.
